title: Pestoriv Conferences

The '''Pestoriv Conferences''' were a series of at least four conferences held<ref name="Specter">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref> during the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] before his [[Death/Legends|death]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date" /> The events were fully open and completely documented, including on a [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]] labeled ''[[Listings of the Fourth Pestoriv Conference]]'', which covered the [[Fourth Pestoriv Conference]] and was kept by Palpatine in the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] storehouse, located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].<ref name="Specter" />  The conferences shared their name with the [[Pestoriv system/Legends|Pestoriv system]] located in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="DateSotP">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Specter of the Past]]'' to [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].</ref> [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunter]] [[Lak Jit]] recovered several datacards kept at Mount Tantiss, including the one detailing the Fourth Pestoriv Conference. Jit was, however, forced to surrender them to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[High Councilor]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. During her inspection of the datacard, Organa Solo mentally noted that the conferences were well-documented, so unless Palpatine was in possession of a secret version of the Conference's events, the datacard was not particularly important.<ref name="Specter" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Pestoriv Conferences were mentioned in the novel ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', written by [[Timothy Zahn]] and published in [[1997]] as part one of the ''[[Star Wars: The Hand of Thrawn Duology]]''.<ref name="Specter" />
